summary: Google Calendar Sync - Slot Generation Enhancement Testing (Iteration 82). Backend: 13/13 tests passed. All features verified: calendarSynced boolean in slots response, calendarSynced=false for user without Google Calendar, slot generation working correctly, health check, and Google Calendar status endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: googleCalendarService.ts has getBusySlots() function at lines 113-136 - correctly fetches freebusy data from Google Calendar
public-booking.ts lines 117-128 correctly: checks for calendar connection, fetches busy slots, merges into allBookedSlots, sets calendarSynced=true
calendarSynced is only included in response when availability exists for the day (expected behavior - no point checking calendar if no slots)
PublicBookingPage.tsx line 357 has data-testid='calendar-synced-indicator' with green indicator text 'Showing real-time availability from Google Calendar'
Frontend correctly shows indicator only when calendarSynced is true and not loading
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Calendar sync for slot generation fully tested. GET /api/book/:userId/:meetingTypeId/slots?date=YYYY-MM-DD returns calendarSynced boolean. For test user without Google Calendar connected, calendarSynced=false. Slot generation returns 16 slots for weekday 09:00-17:00 with 30min duration. Weekend dates return empty slots with message. Frontend has data-testid='calendar-synced-indicator' for the green indicator.

features_tested.google_calendar_status_with_auth: PASS - Returns {connected: false} for test user
features_tested.slots_calendarSynced_false: PASS - calendarSynced=false when user has no Google Calendar
features_tested.slots_response_structure: PASS - Contains slots, date, calendarSynced, meetingType fields
features_tested.slots_count: PASS - Returns 16 slots for 09:00-17:00 with 30min duration
features_tested.slots_format: PASS - Slots in HH:MM format with 30-min increments
features_tested.slots_weekend: PASS - Returns empty slots with 'No availability on this day' message
features_tested.slots_invalid_user: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid user ID
features_tested.slots_invalid_meeting_type: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid meeting type ID
features_tested.page_data: PASS - GET /api/book/:userId returns user and meetingTypes
